ideation: This sequence will depict the robot gently cradling a sunflower, mimicking the care and appreciation one might show for a delicate flower.  The animation will focus on the tenderness of the gesture, using slow, deliberate movements.  The robot's arms will move in a coordinated manner, creating a sense of warmth and affection.  The initial frame will show the arms extended outward to receive the flower. The second frame will show the arms gently drawing the flower closer. The third frame will show the flower cradled in the arms. The fourth frame will show the arms moving slightly to present the flower to the viewer. The fifth frame will show the robot returning to a relaxed position, still holding the flower.  Both arms will be involved to emphasize the care involved.

frames.beat: arms open wide, ready to receive the sunflower
arms gently draw the bloom closer, a tender embrace
the sunflower is cradled softly between the arms
arms lift slightly, presenting the flower with care
arms hold the sunflower, a moment of quiet appreciation
